top_signals.title: Hyperscalers Ditch Canada Investor Calls and Buyers Don’t Care
top_signals.summary: Two of the world’s largest technology companies swiftly raised C$22.5 billion ($15.8 billion) in the Canadian debt market to support their spending plans on artificial intelligence. Investors are now eagerly awaiting another one.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 1776 and all that — the making and remaking of the Declaration of Independence
top_signals.summary: Ahead of its 250th anniversary, four new books examine how America’s founding document has been repurposed over time — and why it remains contested today
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Key Oil Spread Flips to Contango as Supply From Hormuz Climbs - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Key Oil Spread Flips to Contango as Supply From Hormuz Climbs  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Amazon's Zoox unveils redesigned robotaxi ahead of upcoming expansion
top_signals.summary: Zoox is updating its robotaxis as the Amazon division plots expansion in additional markets and prepares to charge for rides.
